name: Cloudflare — Service token code release took down Workers + Zero Trust + CDN
problem_title: Workers platform unavailable — service token management failure after release

expected.notes: Code release in service-token-manager introduced an error. Rollback resolved it in 121 minutes total.

mock_problem.title: Workers platform unavailable — service token management failure after release

evidence.details: Auth service token validation failures: spiking to 100%
service token not found in registry — 401 Unauthorized

entries.message: service-token-manager v9.1.0 deployed — token registry refactor
token lookup failed: registry key format mismatch after migration — token not found
workers-runtime: 401 Unauthorized — no valid service token returned
zero-trust-gateway: auth handshake failed — service token validation error
cdn-control-plane: unable to authenticate with origin — token service returning 401
workers execution rate at 0% — all worker invocations failing auth
customer impact: Workers, Zero Trust, CDN control plane all degraded — widespread 530 errors

deployments.commit_message: refactor: token registry lookup to use new key schema for multi-region support
fix: token expiry edge case in Pacific region
